Aliyun OSS region part of the bucket. Fo: Aliyun OSS region part of the bucket. For example: "oss-cn-beijing".
Base URL for file access, could be your: Base URL for file access, could be your CDN base URL. For example: "https://cdn.nocobase.com".
Default storage will be used when not se: Default storage will be used when not selected
Files are only removed when their corres: Files are only removed when their corresponding records in the file collection are deleted. If a record from another collection includes an associating field referencing the file collection, the file will not be deleted unless cascade deletion is enabled for that association.
Keep file in storage when destroy record: Keep file in storage when destroy record
Keep file in storage when destroy the fi: Keep file in storage when destroy the file record
Minimum from 1 byte, maximum up to 1GB.
Multi-types seperated with comma, for ex: Multi-types seperated with comma, for example: "image/*", "image/png", "image/*, application/pdf" etc.
PDF preview failed. Please download the: Xem trước PDF thất bại. Vui lòng tải tệp xuống để xem.
PDF preview failed to load the file. If: Xem trước PDF không tải được tệp. Nếu tệp được lưu trữ trên tên miền khác, hãy cấu hình CORS cho bộ nhớ ngoài để cho phép trang này đọc tệp.
PDF preview resources failed to load. Pl: Không tải được tài nguyên xem trước PDF. Vui lòng làm mới trang và kiểm tra xem các tệp tĩnh của plugin đã được triển khai đúng chưa.
Relative path the file will be saved to. Left blank as root path. The leading and trailing slashes "/" will be ignored. For example: "user/avatar".
Storage type {{type}} is not registered,: Storage type {{type}} is not registered, please check if related plugin is enabled.
Upload timeout for a single file in mill: Upload timeout for a single file in milliseconds. Default is 600000.
Use the built-in static file server: Use the built-in static file server
